Notice Of Motion For Entry Of Default Judgment Against Defendant
Off Calendar Jan-14-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: A. Mok, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

Lynnda A. McGlinn, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, Accite Holdings (Pty) Ltd,
Order Granting Waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up, on file.
No appearance by defaulted defendant Got Produce? Franchising, A Nevada Corporation,
Default of Defendant has been duly entered.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant as follows:

Damages: $228,453.00
Pre-Judgment Interest: $0.00
Attorney's Fees: $14,608.75
Costs: $973.65
Total Judgment in the amount of $244,035.40

Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-10-2015 Continued To Jan-27-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
